bids.reasoning: At this early stage, I am aiming to present an offer that closely aligns with my highest utility preferences. Since it's still early in the negotiation process, I will not concede much and aim to offer my top preferences, seeking a strong opening position.

I offered my most preferred values initially and have not seen significant concessions from them yet. I will repeat the high-utility bid to set my baseline expectations without rushing into any concessions, keeping room for negotiation later on.

I will maintain valueA for the more crucial issues while experimenting with a minor concession on an issue I'm less concerned about to signal flexibility.
